name: Patient X
history: Recurrent stomachaches and physical symptoms associated with anxiety and stress. Past difficulties involving weight management, sexuality, and academic performance. Reports a transformation during college. Reports seeking control in relationships.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
I am bound to be abandoned
intermediate_belief: I must be perfect to be accepted.
intermediate_belief_depression: If I am not perfect, I will be rejected and alone.
coping_strategies: Attempts to control situations and relationships to avoid feelings of inadequacy.
situation: Experiencing ongoing stomach issues and seeking reassurance about recovery.
auto_thought: I am left out and not good enough.
behavior: Overcompensating by trying to control situations and seeking reassurance.
